summary: Iteration 43 — Phase F Safer Recruitment & HR Operational Personnel Files. Backend 18/18 PASS (iter43_hr) + 34/34 regression (iter42/42b/42c) = 52/52. Frontend end-to-end UI verified live: /hr loads SaferRecruitment page, hero tiles (Total 8 / Action required 8 / Action soon 0 / Docs expired 7), 8 staff rows sorted red-first (Priya Senior + Test Senior Reg both 6-missing at top, Sarah Manager 2-missing at bottom), Agency badge on James Patel, missing-folder hint strings ('Missing: DBS · I.D Documents · Mandatory Training'). Clicking a row opens StaffPersonnelFile with sticky hero, 4-tile counts strip (Compliant 17, Action soon 0, Missing 7, Optional 20), 6-tab navigation each loading its folder grid, folder cards with RAG pills + 'REQUIRED' / 'EXPIRY TRACKED' tags, expired badges showing earliest expiry date, 'Open all missing items' drawer listing 7 items tagged by tab. Audit tab renders profile update events. Back button returns to staff list. Supportive copy throughout ('Can this person legally and safely work here?', 'Ofsted-ready digital personnel files', 'Deterministic personnel-file compliance'). RBAC verified by backend tests (staff+senior 403 on all /api/hr/*).
action_items: None — feature is shipping-ready. Main agent may proceed to Phase F.2 (PDF export, Reg 44/Ofsted inspector view).
critical_code_review_comments: Folder registry (44 entries) is exhaustive and well-tabbed; agency_compliance is correctly conditional on is_agency profile flag.
RAG compute is deterministic (verified via test_dashboard_deterministic) — same inputs produce same RAG output, critical for auditability.

Audit trail captures all 4 mutation actions (hr_file_upload / hr_file_update / hr_file_delete / hr_profile_update) — verified end-to-end via test_file_upload_patch_delete_and_audit and live UI Audit tab.
Supportive tone enforced throughout — no punitive copy, supportive question headings per tab.
Demo seed creates intentional red/amber/green spread (senior expired DBS+training, manager mostly green) enabling immediate UI demo without external setup.
Frontend correctly hides Download button for demo-seeded files (storage_id startswith 'demo-') — real uploads get working download.
Files >700 lines check: staff_personnel.py and SaferRecruitment.jsx within healthy bounds; PersonnelFolderCard and StaffPersonnelFile properly split out.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all spec'd data-testids and flows verified live: page/hero/list/row/personnel-file/tabs/folder-grid x6/missing-drawer/audit/back

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (used). admin@care.local / Admin@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123 also validated via RBAC pytest.
seed_data_creation: None — demo seed _seed_hr_demo_if_empty() in lifespan startup populates 8 staff with realistic RAG mix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F.2 (PDF export + Ofsted/Reg 44 inspection view) is out of scope for this iteration per request. Backend HR endpoints all live and pytest covers: folders registry, dashboard (shape + RAG + red-first sort + determinism), per-staff view, missing-items, file upload/patch/delete + audit, RBAC manager+, agency_compliance visibility, profile patch. Frontend testids fully wired and verified live: safer-recruitment-page, hr-hero-tiles, hr-staff-list, hr-staff-row-{id}, staff-personnel-file, personnel-file-tabs, personnel-folder-grid-{Recruitment|Compliance|Supervisions|Training|HR}, hr-audit-tab, personnel-file-missing-btn, missing-items-drawer, personnel-file-back, hr-folder-{id}, hr-folder-status-{id}, hr-folder-files-{id}, hr-folder-upload-{id}, hr-folder-file-input-{id}, hr-folder-upload-btn-{id}. Note: DBS folder lives in the Recruitment tab (not Compliance) — folder→tab mapping comes from FOLDERS registry in staff_personnel.py.
